channel.title: Jan Baer – Blog
channel.description: Software development, cloud technologies, and photography by Jan Baer.

item.title: My Homepage redesign
item.description: Vor etwa zwei Wochen kam mir die Idee, dass meine Homepage mal wieder ein Redesign vertragen könnte. Der Impuls entstand direkt, nachdem ich gemeinsam…

item.title: 4 Tage im Leben eines alten Baumes
item.description: Momentan ist unser aller Bewegungsradius aufgrund der Einschränkungen wegen des Corona-Virus ja leider sehr eingeschränkt. Deshalb führen mich meine a…

item.title: MDWiki rewrite
item.description: As I wrote in my previous blog entry before a while I decided to give up the domains for my personal projects and let it run as subdomains under my pe…

item.title: Reject domains for personal projects
item.description: Because of personal reasons I had to reject to both domain names I used for my personal projects mdwiki.net and howcani.eu. So from November this year…

item.title: My Projects
item.description: I just wrote an article about my projects, but as a separate page and not as a normal blog post. You can read it here.

item.title: How can I protect my external USB stick with a password on MacOS Sierra
item.description: To protect your USB-stick with a password you have to format it first with the Disk Utility program to the Mac OS Extended (Journaled) format with the…

item.title: How to run a scheduled job within a Docker container
item.description: For some reasons it could be necessary to execute a job in scheduled time. When running the job within a Docker container there're two ways to do this…

item.title: Quicktip - Move windows between desktops on MacOSX
item.description: To move windows, click and hold on any window titlebar and hit the shortcut you defined for the desktop (in my case it's command+1,2,3) and the window…

item.title: From C# to Python
item.description: Last week I did my first steps with Python) and I was really suprised about this programming language that has such a long history. It provides featur…

item.title: Find out which process uses my port
item.description: Today I had the problem, that someone has used the port 3000 on my macbook and I couldn't start my node.js server. At first I tried to close all open …

item.title: Reisebericht Dubai
item.description: Gleich im Anschluss an unseren Urlaub in Indien machten wir einen Zwischenstop in Dubai, um auch diese Stadt kennenzulernen. Und was soll ich sagen, w…

item.title: Reisebericht Indien
item.description: Eigentlich wollte ich von meiner Reise nach Indien einen ausführlichen Reisebericht schreiben und habe das in meinem privaten Tagebuch auch jeden Tag …

item.title: Using hooks in git
item.description: Wenn man nach "git hooks" sucht, findet man jede Menge Links zu guten Beschreibungen, was es für verschiedene Hooks in Git gibt und was man alles dami…

item.title: LinqPerformanceTips
item.description: In my latest project I learned some thinks about the performance of Linq when you often query in-memory repositories. Linq is very easy to use and wit…
